[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010011 4
1 0001010 2
2 1010010 3
3 0000000 a
4 0001111 4
5 0010110 3
6 0001000 1
7 0010010 2

01 10 0011111 5
12 21 0011110 4
23 32 0011010 3
34 43 0111110 5
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1011011 5
67 76 1011010 4
70 07 1011111 6

02 20 0001111 4 match 4
13 31 0010110 3 match 5
24 42 0111110 5
35 53 1010011 4 match 0
46 64 0111110 5
57 75 1010011 4 match 0
60 06 0001111 4 match 4
71 17 1010110 4

14 41 0111110 5

36 63 0011010 3
47 74 1111110 6
50 05 1011111 6
61 16 0011110 4
72 27 1011010 4

04 40 0111111 6
15 51 1010111 5
26 62 0001010 2 match 1
37 73 1010010 3 match 2
